thought.text: I didn't find any direct references to GitHub in the project files. Let me check if there's a Git configuration file that might contain repository information.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cat /workspace/project/.git/config", "is_input": "false", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Check the git config for remote repository URLs"}

summary: Check the git config for remote repository URLs
